query_normalized: investigating the impact of network centrality on resting-state functional connectivity in autism spectrum disorder neuroscience
rationale: The paper focuses on using Deep Reinforcement Learning as a classification tool to distinguish ASD from neurotypical controls, rather than investigating the biological mechanism of how network centrality impacts resting-state functional connectivity.
